template.source_template: assets/templates/蓝色-学术答辩多版式通用模板 (Academic Defense Multi-Layout Template).pptx

identity_features: five-segment navy top navigation with a dark active tab
navy chevron marker before each claim-led page title
fine dashed content boundary on a white research canvas
navy header strips and numbered circular process markers
pale blue cover treatment with high-contrast navy typography

acceptance.release_blocker: T01-T08 and formal PowerPoint review must all pass
